overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a carpenter working on a log in a misty medieval village, then walking through the settlement past traditional half-timbered houses, and entering a wooden cabin. The footage features atmospheric overcast lighting and detailed historical architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: carpenter's outdoor work area beside log cabin

events.description: text overlay 'CARPENTER' appears briefly at top of frame then disappears
carpenter stops working, stands up from workbench, and begins walking away

agents.ego_description: using a drawknife to shape a wooden log at an outdoor workbench, performing repetitive planing motions

entered.detail: rough-hewn horizontal log wall with dark weathered wood texture
wooden sawhorse supporting a large log being worked
pile of cut timber logs stacked horizontally on the ground
simple wooden pole fence running along the grassy area
small wooden structure with thatched roof visible through the mist

segments.scene_description: In a misty medieval village setting, the camera focuses on a carpenter working at an outdoor bench beside a log cabin. The character methodically shapes a log with a drawknife while surrounded by stacked timber and simple wooden fencing, with distant buildings visible through the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: village dirt path between traditional wooden houses

events.description: leaving the work area and entering the open village path
character turns slightly while continuing to walk along the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy village path, passing various wooden and half-timbered structures while carrying a tool

entered.detail: muddy track with visible wheel ruts and scattered stones
traditional wattle and daub construction with dark wooden beams forming triangular gable
circular stone structure in a grassy area beside the path
tall wooden post with small house structure on top

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the carpenter as he walks away from his workbench along a muddy village path. The scene opens to reveal traditional half-timbered houses and wooden fences lining the route, with misty forest visible in the background. The character passes a stone well and wooden birdhouse as he moves deeper into the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of log cabin with sleeping area and cooking space

events.description: entering the dark interior of a wooden house from the outdoor village
transition from natural overcast light to dim interior illuminated by wall sconce

agents.ego_description: opening a wooden door and stepping inside the cabin, then walking past a seated NPC toward the interior room

notable_agents.action: sitting against the wall near a wooden ladder, observing the player character enter

entered.detail: dark wooden door frame leading into the shadowy interior
tall wooden ladder leaning against the wall leading to an upper level
lit torch or oil lamp mounted on the wall providing warm orange light
small fire or light source illuminating the far end of the room

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit log cabin, transitioning from the misty exterior to a dark interior space. Inside, a wooden ladder leads to an upper level near a seated NPC, while warm light from a wall sconce and distant cooking fire illuminates the rustic wooden walls and packed earth floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty outdoor workshop into the warm, dim interior of a rustic log cabin. It begins focused on a carpenter methodically shaping a log with a drawknife at an outdoor bench, surrounded by stacked timber and hazy distant buildings. As the carpenter walks away from his workbench, the scene opens onto a muddy village path lined with traditional half-timbered houses, a stone well, and a wooden birdhouse against a backdrop of misty forests. The camera then follows him as he transitions from the overcast exterior into the dark interior of a cabin, where the lighting shifts to the warm glow of a wall sconce and a distant cooking fire. Finally, the view expands to reveal the rustic wooden walls and a packed earth floor, with a wooden ladder leading up toward a seated figure.
